name: 探索编辑比 Explore-Edit Ratio
desc: 66 nodes spent reading LLaMA-Factory; only one create_file all run.

steps.t: Step 6-10: open_file config.yaml, README.md, hfd.sh + search_dir+find_file
Steps 11-32: open_file/search_file/list_files x20+ on loader.py etc.
Step 33: create_file (the ONLY edit action of the run)
Step 50,51,61,64: search_file + 3 more open_file on loader.py
Counts: open=14, list=6, search_file=9, search_dir=3, find=3 → 35
